name: BuildInput error: common violation reported before item violation
description: When one operator violates BOTH a strict common field and a strict item field at once, every runtime must surface the common error first. pine-go RowFrame/ColumnFrame.BuildInput and pine-java DataFrame.buildInput validate common (strict then nullable) before item, so the canonical first error is the common one. Single-violation fixtures cannot catch a runtime that front-loads the strict-item batch scan and flips to item-first; this fixture locks the cross-runtime ordering as part of the byte-exact error contract.

expected_error.message_contains: required field "c" is nil in common
expected_error.wrapping_exact: pine: execution error in operator "build_input_common_before_item": required field "c" is nil in common
